steps.title: Express the filler content from each fertilizer
steps.content:
Fertilizer A is 60% filler by weight, so $x$ pounds of Fertilizer A contains $0.6x$ pounds of filler materials.

Fertilizer B is 40% filler by weight, so $y$ pounds of Fertilizer B contains $0.4y$ pounds of filler materials.

steps.title: Set up the equation for total filler materials
steps.content:
The total filler materials from both fertilizers equals 240 pounds:
$$0.6x + 0.4y = 240$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
